back_translation: And I heard a loud voice from the temple, saying to the seven angels, ‘Go, and pour the seven bowls of God's wrath down on the earth’
The first angel went and poured his bowl on the earth, and there were evil and loathsome sores on the people who had the mark of the wild-beast, and on those who worshiped the image of it
The second angel poured his bowl into the sea, and the water in the sea became blood like the blood of dead people, and every living thing in the sea died
The third angel poured his bowl into the rivers and all the springs, and those waters became blood
And I heard the angel of the waters say, ‘You are righteous, the One who is and the One who was, the Holy One, because You have judged these things
Because they spilled the blood of the saints and of the prophets, You have therefore caused them to drink blood. They deserve it’
And I heard a voice from the altar say, ‘Yes, O Lord God, the One who possesses supreme authority, Your judgments are true and righteous’
The fourth angel poured his bowl on the sun, and the sun received authority to scorch humanity with fire
And humanity was scorched with intense heat, and they cursed-and-blasphemed the name of God, the One who has authority over these plagues. And they did not repent, and did not give honor to Him
The fifth angel poured his bowl on the throne of the wild-beast, and the kingdom of it became dark, and they gnawed-and-chewed their tongues from pain
And they cursed-and-blasphemed the God of heaven, because of their pain and because of their sores. And they did not repent from their deeds
The sixth angel poured his bowl on the great river, namely the Euphrates, and the water of that river dried up, in order to prepare a way for the kings who come from the East
And I saw three spirits, namely unclean-spirits, coming out of the mouth of the dragon, and from the mouth of the wild-beast, and from the mouth of the false-prophet. They had appearance like frogs

Because these spirits were spirits of demons that perform signs, going out to the kings of the entire earth, in order to assemble them to wage war on the great day of God, the One who possesses supreme authority
‘Behold, I will come like a thief. The one who watches and keeps his clothes is blessed, so that he will not have to walk naked, and so that all people will not see his shame’
And those spirits assembled all the kings to the place which in the Hebrew language is called Armageddon
The seventh angel poured his bowl into the air, and a loud voice came out from the temple which came from the throne, saying, ‘It is finished’

And there were flashes of lightning, various sounds, peals of thunder, and a violent earthquake, the likes of which had never occurred since humanity has been on the earth, an earthquake of that great a magnitude and that intense

And the great city was split into three parts, and the cities of the nations collapsed. And great Babylon was remembered before the face of God, in order that He would give to her the cup of the wine of His furious wrath
And every island fled, and the mountains were not found anymore

And great hailstones, weighing about one talent, fell down from the sky onto humanity. And humanity cursed-and-blasphemed God, because of the plague of those hailstones, because that plague was extremely violent
